title: When the Quilt
description: A Quilt 1.19.2 kitchen sink modpack with lots of mods
body:
A Quilt 1.19.2 kitchen sink modpack with lots of mods

## Alpha?

This pack is currently in alpha, not because it isn't stable, but because mods are being added to it daily. When mod additions are no longer quite so frequent, this pack will move into a short beta phase, then onto release.

## Attributions

+ [Rat's Mischief](https://github.com/Ladysnake/Rats-Mischief) — Ladysnake
